subject: Spring Boot 3 participant for compatibility testing
commit_message:
Spring Boot 3 participant for compatibility testing

Change Participant Simulator to use Spring Boot 3.5. This is to
detect compatibility issues when using latest intermediary library
built on Spring Boot 4 against participants using Spring Boot 3.

Issue-ID: POLICY-5560
Change-Id: I0dec9c9d9fcf1eca912c263940e0a21658e6b86a
Signed-off-by: danielhanrahan <daniel.hanrahan@est.tech>
